name: sidemantic
description: Build, validate, and query Sidemantic semantic models, and generate analytics webapps from them.

interface.shortDescription: Model metrics and build analytics webapps from semantic SQL.
interface.longDescription: Sidemantic helps Codex build, validate, query, and migrate SQL-first semantic models, then turn those models into analytics dashboards and app surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Create a Sidemantic model from my schema.
Build a dashboard from my Sidemantic models.
